## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I updated `docs/DATABASE.md`, `firestore.rules`, and/or `firestore.indexes.json` if the Firestore schema or access patterns changed.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where applicable.
- [ ] All user-facing strings are in `strings.xml` (no hardcoded UI strings).
